title: Social Security (Additional Payments) Act 2023, Section 1
body: Means-tested additional payments. The Secretary of State must secure that a single payment of £301 is made for the first qualifying day, a single payment of £300 is made for the second qualifying day, and a single payment of £299 is made for the third qualifying day. HMRC must secure corresponding £301, £300, and £299 payments for qualifying child tax credit or working tax credit recipients who are not qualifying through a social security benefit.

title: Social Security (Additional Payments) Act 2023, Section 5
body: Disability additional payments. The Secretary of State must secure that a single payment of £150, called a disability additional payment, is made to each individual entitled to a payment of a disability benefit payable in respect of the disability additional payment day.
